rulings.Case Title: 1049 MARKET STREET, LLC VS. CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-17-559890 WITH CASE CGC-15-547161
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for February 5, 2018 line 1. PLAINTIFF 1049 MARKET STREET, LLC's MOTION TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS OF CASE(S) CGC-17-559890 WITH CASE CGC-15-547161 GRANTED. Actions are consolidated for all purposes. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: NICOLAS GONZALEZ VS. VANGUARD PROPERTIES, INC. A CALIFORNIA CORPORATION
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION Of Recission Cause Of Action
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for February 5, 2018 line 2. PLAINTIFF NICOLAS GONZALEZ's MOTION FOR SUMMARY ADJUDICATION Of Recission Cause Of Action continued to February 8, 2018 to be heard with other pending motion. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: COLBY LAM VS. ANDREW KENNY ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendant Andrew Kenny'S Notice Of Motion And Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for February 5, 2018 line 3. DEFENDANT ANDREW KENNY'S Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings GRANTED in part and DENIED in part. Motion is GRANTED as to the cause of action for nuisance with leave to amend for plaintiff to allege facts in support of nuisance cause of caution so that it is not duplicative of negligence cause of action. El Escorial Owner's Ass'n v. DLC Plastering (2007) 154 Cal.App.4th 1337. Motion is denied as to the cause of action for breach of contract. Plaintiff sufficiently alleges defendant's breach of obligation under the CC&Rs and standing to enforce the CC&Rs. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: GIBSON CANITES VS. YEVA, INC. ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For An Order Directing The Clerk To Release Cash Deposit
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for February 5, 2018 line 4. INTERVENOR KAREN LUM's Motion For An Order Directing The Clerk To Release Cash Deposit OFF CALENDAR, premature. Complaint in intervention is not yet at issue. Additionally, the moving papers do not provide any authority for the proposition that the requested relief (which is also the relief prayed for in the Complaint in Intervention) may be sought by a motion. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: LAN LE VS. ZANZI KNIGHT ET AL

rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for February 5, 2018 line 5. DEFENDANTs ZANZI KNIGHT, SUNDIATA KNIGHT and THABITI KNIGHT's Motion In Support Of Defendants' Petition For Relief From Forfeiture Hearing Required. = (501/REQ)
